no: Bart Tweaks by Bartimaeus. Post-tactical tweaks, fixes for SR/aTweaks/SCS, and rule changes. Several components require Spell Revisions + aTweaks or SCS.

conflicts.reason: Bart Tweaks has a broader version of this fix
Similar to Bart Tweaks No Reputation Loss from Slayer Form. Choose one.

sum: 26 misc tweaks installed after tactical mods: convenience features and adjustments that should apply on top of all other changes.

dependencies.reason: Bart #2001/#2002 (10%/20% Magic Resistance) have REQUIRE_PREDICATE MOD_IS_INSTALLED ~item-rev/setup-item_rev.tp2~ #0. Component silently skips if Item Revisions is not installed first.

Bart #2030 (Revised Shapeshifting Tokens for SCS) REQUIRE_PREDICATE MOD_IS_INSTALLED ~stratagems~ #4030. Chain risk: SCS #4030 itself FORBIDs ToF #40600 and #41000 — if either is installed, SCS #4030 silently skips, which then silently skips this component. Install order requires: ToF without #40600/#41000 → SCS with #4030 → Bart_Tweaks.
Bart #2041/#2042 (SR/atweaks Elementals), #2051/#2052 (SR/atweaks Fiends), #2060 (SR/atweaks Call Woodland Beings) all require Spell Revisions core installed first.

Bart #2041/#2042 require aTweaks #190 (PnP Elementals); #2051/#2052 require aTweaks #152 (PnP Fiends); #2060 requires aTweaks #186 (Revised Call Woodland Beings). All silently skip if aTweaks not installed with matching components.
dependencies.theirComps: #190 PnP Elementals, #152 PnP Fiends, #186 Revised Call Woodland Beings

dependencies.reason: Bart #3020 (Alternative Weapon Mastery) has REQUIRE_PREDICATE MOD_IS_INSTALLED ~SETUP-TB#TWEAKS.TP2~ #3600. Component silently skips if TB Tweaks #3600 is not installed first.

co.n: No Reputation Loss from Slayer Form
co.no: Removes reputation loss from Slayer Form. Redundant with TnT cn:44 (reduced loss) and Slayer Revisions — choose one approach.
co.tp2n: No Reputation Loss from Slayer Form

co.no: Adds a debug ring via CLUAConsole. Cheat/testing item — not for normal gameplay.
Disables random treasure generation from containers.
Makes 7+ NPC-specific items droppable/movable (e.g. Minsc's sword, Jaheira's armor).

co.n: "Personal" for Ranges of 0 and "Touch" for Ranges of 1
co.no: Updates all spell descriptions to show 'Personal' for range 0 and 'Touch' for range 1. Most informative option. Scans all spell files — install after all spell mods.
co.scn: Display Actual Range of Spells in Descriptions
co.tp2n: "Personal" for Ranges of 0 and "Touch" for Ranges of 1

co.scn: Display Actual Range of Spells in Descriptions
co.no: Shows 'Touch' for range 1 only in spell descriptions.

co.scn: Display Actual Range of Spells in Descriptions
co.no: Shows 'Personal' for range 0 only in spell descriptions.

co.scn: Display Actual Range of Spells in Descriptions
co.no: Shows numeric range values only in spell descriptions.
Allows curing spells at 10ft range. Least permissive ranged healing option.
Allows curing spells at 20ft range. Balanced option.
Allows curing spells at 30ft range. Most permissive.

co.n: Disable Protection Against +x Weapon Enchantment Levels
co.no: Disables Protection from Magical Weapons enchantment level checks. Major balance change.
co.tp2n: Disable Protection Against +x Weapon Enchantment Levels

co.no: Non-upgradeable Carsomyr with 10% MR. Requires Item Revisions cn:0.
Non-upgradeable Carsomyr with 20% MR. Requires Item Revisions cn:0.
Puts Ras (Flail of Ages component) in a quick slot.

co.n: Quick Slot Ring of Djinni Summoning
co.no: Puts Ring of Djinni Summoning in quick slot.
co.tp2n: Quick Slot Ring of Djinni Summoning

co.no: Reverts Lightning Bolt to original BG1 bouncing bolt behavior.
Fixes shapeshifting tokens for SCS compatibility. Requires SCS cn:4030 (Improved Shapeshifting).
Fixes elemental summoning for SR+aTweaks combo. Requires Spell Revisions cn:0 + aTweaks cn:190 (PnP Elementals).
Fixes hybrid fiends for SR+aTweaks combo. Requires Spell Revisions cn:0 + aTweaks cn:152 (PnP Fiends).
Fixes Call Woodland Beings for SR+aTweaks combo. Requires Spell Revisions cn:0 + aTweaks cn:186 (Revised Woodland Beings).
Requires TB#Tweaks cn:3600 (WSPATCK for all) — not available in EET mod forge. Will fail to install.
Overwrites lore.2da with alternative class-based lore scaling. Hard COPY — no mod detection.
Overwrites mxsplsrc.2da and splsrckn.2da with more spells known per level. Hard COPY — no mod detection. Conflicts with cdtweaks cn:2250, klatu cn:2010, SelphiraTweaks cn:21 (last installed wins).
Overwrites mxsplwis.2da with alternative WIS bonus spell slots. Hard COPY — no mod detection. Conflicts with cdtweaks, HouseTweaks, SubtleD Stat Overhauls, zgtweaks (all modify same file).
Overwrites hpconbon.2da with 3E-style CON bonuses and regeneration. Hard COPY — no mod detection. Conflicts with ToF cn:80000 (Ability Score Modifiers).
